/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/final_visualize.dir/src/LauncherMain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_visualize.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_visualize.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_visualize.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_visualize.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_visualize.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_visualize.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_visualize.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o final_visualize  -lglfw -lGLEW -lGL -lm -ldl -lpthread
